main.description: A custom-emoji reaction to a post. Analogous to app.bsky.feed.like, but the reaction glyph is a Bluemoji. Duplicate reactions (same subject + same emoji URI by the same actor) should be ignored by AppViews.

subject.description: AT-URI of the post being reacted to.

subjectCid.description: CID of the subject post at reaction time, for strong referencing.

emojiRef.description: Denormalized reference to the Bluemoji used, mirroring blue.moji.richtext.facet: CID-only formats let consumers build blob/CDN URLs without a getRecord round-trip. AppViews should verify against the indexed item where possible.

uri.description: AT-URI of the blue.moji.collection.item record. The owning DID is derived from this.

name.description: Colon-wrapped alias, e.g. :blobcat:. Used as fallback text.
